offer: For logistics carriers managing 10-50 daily deliveries, inefficient tracking causes missed delivery deadlines. We consolidate daily delivery logs instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient tracking of driver performance leading to missed delivery deadlines.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows

try_it: Let users try daily log consolidation on 1-3 items

Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
